response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetics match the reference lyrics perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: Fully used the provided lyrics. Discovered additional spoken dialogue at the end (01:31 - 01:42) and transcribed/translated it manually. Discovered a prominent written letter on the ending card (01:45 onwards) and subtitled it to aid viewers. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the lyrics and spoken lines precisely with active vocal patterns. Subtitled the silent end card text across logical segments.

subtitles.original: もっと輝くよ そうだろう 叫べばいい
subtitles.english: I'll shine even brighter, right? Just shout it out.

subtitles.original: 憧れより眩しい歌 そして激しい歌
subtitles.english: A song more dazzling than longing, and a fierce song too.

subtitles.original: いつか耳を塞いだ その両手がきっと翼になる
subtitles.english: The hands that once covered my ears will surely become wings.
At least, that's what I think.

subtitles.original: 高く飛べるよ そうだろう

subtitles.english: I can't hold it back anymore!

subtitles.original: 羽ばたく理由を誰かに許されなくても
subtitles.english: Even if no one gives me permission to spread my wings.

subtitles.original: もう決めたよ 迷わない
subtitles.english: I've already decided, I won't hesitate.

subtitles.original: 向かい風もきっと進んでる証拠だって
subtitles.english: Because even a headwind is proof that I'm moving forward.
I will convey this to you!

subtitles.original: 何度でも君を呼んで また歩いてゆく
subtitles.english: No matter how many times, I will call your name and keep walking.

subtitles.original: 皆さん本日は生誕祭に来てくださってありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Everyone, thank you so much for coming to my birthday celebration today!

subtitles.original: ソロライブ楽しみに待っててね！
subtitles.english: Please look forward to my solo live concert!

subtitles.original: [手紙] ルイ友へ♡\nみんなの応援のおかげで… ついに私もソロライブできるよ!! 本当にありがとう♡
subtitles.english: [Letter] To my dear Rui-tomo♡\nThanks to everyone's support... I can finally hold my solo live!! Thank you so much♡

subtitles.original: [手紙] もっともっと強くなって光り輝いて階段をのぼって、\nいろんな景色をみせてあげるね☺☆ (任せろー!!)
subtitles.english: [Letter] I'll get stronger, shine brightly, climb the stairs,\nand show you so many beautiful sights ☺☆ (Leave it to me!!)

subtitles.original: [手紙] 私の物語には君が必要です!!\nこれからもよろしくね!!
subtitles.english: [Letter] I need you in my story!!\nI look forward to being with you from now on too!!
